description: Using the Activity Browser, visualize the upstream supply chain of steel production. Open the activity 'Steel, basic oxygen furnace, at plant' from the Energy_and_Materials database in the Graph Explorer view. Expand at least 2 levels of the upstream supply chain so that the graph shows the full network of contributing processes (the steel activity, the electricity grid mix it depends on, and the individual power plant technologies feeding into the grid). The task is complete when the Graph Explorer displays a supply chain graph with 3 or more visible nodes across at least 2 upstream levels.
